creator: adox@mcx2.org
text:
ahh fu** please use this patch

retrieving revision 1.20
diff -u -u -r1.20 Makefile
--- Makefile	25 Dec 2008 20:00:17 -0000	1.20
+++ Makefile	6 Jan 2009 16:48:43 -0000
@@ -7,13 +7,13 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	xist
-PORTVERSION=	3.5
+PORTVERSION=	3.6
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://ftp.livinglogic.de/xist/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 DISTNAME=	ll-${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	adox@mcx2.org
 COMMENT=	An XML-based extensible HTML generator
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYXML} \
